projects.title: Plate, Rush, Serve!
projects.alt_text: Title of the game, 'Plate, Rush, Serve!' in front of a background with flan and coffee on a table.
projects.description: Plate food and serve customers quickly to get the highest score in a conveyor belt style restaurant. Made with Pixelbox.

projects.title: Void Village
projects.alt_text: Two animal villagers standing in front of a house with a flower on the right.
projects.description: A small experience where you have conversations with villagers living in the middle of nowhere. LittleJS Game Jam submission.

projects.title: Whisker's Farm
projects.alt_text: The back of a cat facing an ominous forest that fades aways into darkness.
projects.description: Short horror farming RPG in your small hometown with a suspicious forest. Farm Jam submission, made with Godot.

projects.title: Prepare for Takeoff!
projects.alt_text: Three buns being carried by a winged serpent as they are ready to takeoff from the dock.
projects.description: A rendered 3D scene of three buns preparing to takeoff on a winged serpent. 3D Modelling Jam submission, made with Blender.

projects.title: Meddlesome Dreams
projects.alt_text: A title screen with the words 'Meddlesome Dreams', and imagery of a shambu creature and a sleepy bun.
projects.description: 3D retro escape room puzzle game where you're trapped in a dream when you take a nap at the beach! 32BitJam 'Summer Dreams' submission, made with Godot.

projects.title: No Fish, No Refund!
projects.alt_text: A title screen with the words 'No Fish No Refund!', and imagery of some groups of fish swimming to the right.
projects.description: A game where you run to the fish store to get the refund you deserve! LOWREZJAM 2025 submission, made with Godot.
